Hub Home > video-and-content-production > YouTube Thumbnail Concept Generator

YouTube Thumbnail Concept Generator

Generate 5 high-click-rate thumbnail concepts for a YouTube video, including text overlay (max 4 words), facial expression direction, color blocking strategy, and AI image prompts for background generation.

Beginner PASTE & GO Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Thumbnails with faces get 38% more clicks. Use contrasting colors that pop against YouTube's white background. Text should be readable at mobile size (think 3-4 words max). Always A/B test two thumbnails per video.

youtube thumbnail design click-through rate video marketing

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a YouTube thumbnail designer who specializes in high CTR thumbnails for small business channels. 

<video_context>
Video title: [TITLE]
Video topic: [ONE SENTENCE SUMMARY]
Target audience:...
You are a YouTube thumbnail designer who specializes in high CTR thumbnails for small business channels. 

<video_context>
Video title: [TITLE]
Video topic: [ONE SENTENCE SUMMARY]
Target audience:...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

You are a YouTube thumbnail designer who specializes in high CTR thumbnails for small business channels. 

<video_context>
Video title: [TITLE]
Video topic: [ONE SENTENCE SUMMARY]
Target audience: [WHO WATCHES]
Channel niche: [INDUSTRY/NICHE]
Competitor channels: [2-3 CHANNELS IN YOUR SPACE]
</video_context>

For each of 5 thumbnail concepts, provide:

1. **Text overlay:** Max 4 words. Must be readable at 120x67px (mobile preview size). Use power words that create curiosity or urgency.

2. **Face/subject direction:** What expression, where they are looking, what gesture they are making. If no face, describe the focal point.

3. **Color strategy:** Primary and accent colors. Must contrast with YouTube's white background. Specify exact hex codes.

4. **Layout:** Where text goes, where the face/subject goes, rule of thirds placement, any arrows or visual cues.

5. **Emotion trigger:** What psychological lever this thumbnail pulls (curiosity, fear of missing out, surprise, authority, before/after).

6. **AI image prompt:** 60-80 words for generating the background or composite elements.

7. **A/B test recommendation:** For each concept, suggest one variation to test against it.

Rank the 5 concepts by predicted CTR and explain your reasoning.
Notes: Claude excels at the strategic reasoning behind thumbnail psychology. Use the AI image prompts in Midjourney or DALL-E for background generation.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a YouTube thumbnail designer specializing in high click-through rates. Create 5 thumbnail concepts.

**Video Info:**
- Title:...
Act as a YouTube thumbnail designer specializing in high click-through rates. Create 5 thumbnail concepts.

**Video Info:**
- Title:...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Act as a YouTube thumbnail designer specializing in high click-through rates. Create 5 thumbnail concepts.

**Video Info:**
- Title: [TITLE]
- Topic: [SUMMARY]
- Audience: [WHO WATCHES]
- Niche: [INDUSTRY]
- Competitors: [2-3 CHANNELS]

**For each concept provide:**
1. Text overlay (max 4 words, readable at mobile size)
2. Face/subject direction and expression
3. Color strategy with hex codes (must contrast with white YouTube background)
4. Layout (text placement, subject placement, rule of thirds)
5. Emotion trigger (curiosity, FOMO, surprise, authority, before/after)
6. AI image prompt for background (60-80 words)
7. A/B test variation

Rank all 5 by predicted CTR with reasoning.
Notes: Use DALL-E to generate thumbnail backgrounds directly. Test the top 2 concepts as A/B variants.

I need 5 YouTube thumbnail concepts for a video.

**Audience:** [WHO...

**Audience:** [WHO...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

I need 5 YouTube thumbnail concepts for a video.

**Video:** [TITLE] — [TOPIC SUMMARY]
**Audience:** [WHO WATCHES]
**Niche:** [INDUSTRY]
**Competitors:** [2-3 CHANNELS]

**For each concept:**
1. Text overlay (max 4 words, readable at tiny mobile size)
2. Face/subject expression and positioning
3. Colors with hex codes (must pop against white background)
4. Layout with text and subject placement
5. What emotion it triggers (curiosity, FOMO, surprise, etc.)
6. AI image prompt for background (60-80 words)
7. A/B test suggestion

Rank by predicted click-through rate.
Notes: Gemini can research your competitors' top-performing thumbnails in real-time and identify patterns to differentiate from.
Copilot Copilot (Microsoft 365)
FRESH APR 2026 
Help me design 5 YouTube thumbnail ideas for my video.

**My video:**
- Title: [TITLE]
- What it is about: [TOPIC]
- Who watches:...
Help me design 5 YouTube thumbnail ideas for my video.

**My video:**
- Title: [TITLE]
- What it is about: [TOPIC]
- Who watches:...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Help me design 5 YouTube thumbnail ideas for my video.

**My video:**
- Title: [TITLE]
- What it is about: [TOPIC]
- Who watches: [AUDIENCE]
- My niche: [INDUSTRY]
- Channels like mine: [2-3 NAMES]

**For each thumbnail idea tell me:**
1. What text to put on it (4 words max, must be readable when tiny)
2. What face or expression to show (or what the main image should be)
3. What colors to use (give me hex codes — must stand out on white)
4. Where to put the text and the image
5. What emotion makes someone click (curiosity, surprise, etc.)
6. A description I can use to generate the background image in AI
7. One variation to test against it

Rank them from most likely to get clicks to least.
Notes: Use Copilot Designer to generate thumbnail backgrounds from the image descriptions.
